def positive_public_api_forwards_library_specific_exception_shape():
    rule_id = "public_api_forwards_library_specific_exception_shape"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag public interfaces that require callers to understand raw exceptions from underlying libraries."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
